task: Detect current regime (Rainforest + PatternDetector + Dreamer signals + timing). Automatically adjust risk levels, rich TradeDecision parameters (TimeExitSpec, partials, trailing), ensemble weighting (Rainforest vs Dreamer vs PPO), and policy head hints. Integrates with Decision PPO, ExecutionAgent, and fast backtest engine.
summary: Full regime detection + adaptation layer live. Adapts risk (0.35-1.45x), TD rich specs (news-tight exits vs trend-runners), ensemble weights dynamically, provides policy adapters for backtesting + PPO. Used by SelfEvolutionSupervisor for regime_robustness goals and adaptation boosts.

integrations.DecisionPPO: adapt_trade_decision on rich 18-dim outputs before ExecutionAgent handoff; policy_head_hint for multi-head selection
integrations.ExecutionAgent: Pre-submit adapted TradeDecision (size, TimeExitSpec, trailing, partials, tags with regime provenance)
integrations.FastBacktester: get_backtest_policy_adapter + regime injection for rapid OOS validation of regime-aware variants (minutes-scale weeks of data)
integrations.SelfEvolutionSupervisor: Loaded as 'regime_controller'; drives regime_adaptation_boost, regime_robustness telemetry, recommended_focus_areas
integrations.MetaController / Ensemble: get_ensemble_weights + pattern+timing context passed through raw_votes
integrations.HybridBrain / agi_brain: Optional: regime gate + adaptation hints (complements existing rainforest gate)
integrations.RetrainingTrigger: regime stability + performance-per-regime feeds trigger decisions

adaptation_examples.high_vol_news: risk_mult~0.55, tight max_hold + close_before_news=True, Rainforest-heavy ensemble, defensive policy_hint
adaptation_examples.strong_trend: risk_mult>1.1, long max_hold, step_trail + runner partials, Dreamer-heavy weights, trend_following hint
adaptation_examples.ranging: risk<0.75, early scale partials + BE, Rainforest-dominant weights

confidence: HIGH — production-grade with full graceful degradation and rich TradeDecision support
